creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
Looks fine for me, except remaining
(INSTALL_DOC_DIR, ['wsgi.py', 'ChangeLog', 'COPYING', 'README', 'INSTALL']),
line in patch-setup.py. AFAICS Makefile installs PORTDOCS correctly.
As soon as it's removed - I'm ok with patch, and thanks again for it.

On Wed, Sep 15, 2010 at 19:52, Josh Paetzel <jpaetzel@freebsd.org> wrote:
> No idea what happened with my last response, but the online PR hates it.
>
> Here is a patch that fixes all of the issues.
>
> --
> Thanks,
>
> Josh Paetzel
> FreeBSD -- The power to serve
>



-- 
Regards, Denis.
